name: Umayr Sheik
title: Founder
relationship_to_me: Close friend and tech peer based in Dubai. One of the few people Sanchay considers a match for deep AI/ML discussions. Connected Feb 2025; became close quickly through regular WhatsApp DMs.
one_paragraph_summary: Close friend and tech peer based in Dubai. One of the few people Sanchay considers a match for deep AI/ML discussions. Connected Feb 2025; became close quickly through regular WhatsApp DMs. · Regular DM covering AI/tech discussions, personal life updates, movie recs, and mutual project coordination

interactions.summary: Initial introductory call scheduling that led to moving to WhatsApp and the start of their friendship
Sanchay forwarded an exclusive San Francisco event invite from Limitless AI to Umayr
Sanchay reached out to reconnect after a communication gap, expressing he misses their tech conversations
Regular DM covering AI/tech discussions, personal life updates, movie recs, and mutual project coordination
